resources.string: I-Chatforia isita bantfu kutsi bachumane ngetilwimi, emadivayisi, kanye nemincele.
Khetsa kutsi imilayeto ivela njani, inyamalala nini, nekutsi i-akhawunti yakho ihlala ivikelekile njani.

I-Chatforia sitfunywa lesiphephile, lesinetilwimi letinyenti lesinekubhala kusuka ekugcineni kuya ekugcineni, kuhumusha lokusheshako, kanye nekushayela ngelivi/ngevidiyo. Umsebenti wetfu ulula: kusita bantfu kutsi bachumane—ngekuphepha, ngasese, nangetilwimi tonkhe.
Imilayeto ibhaliwe kudivayisi yakho ngaphambi kwekutsi iphume kuyo. Kuhumusha, kwenta ema- backup kanye nekuvumelanisa idivayisi kwentelwe kunciphisa loko emaseva etfu langakubona.
Kubhala ngekubhala kusuka ekugcineni kuya ekugcineni kanye nekulawula kwebumfihlo kwakhiwe ku-Chatforia kusukela ekucaleni.
Kufinyelela kwabo bonkhe: Kuhumusha ngekuzenzakalela tilwimi letingu-100+.
Kufinyelela kwabo bonkhe: Humusha ngekuzenzakalela tilwimi letingu-100+.
Kulawula: Imilayeto lenyamalalako kanye nemarisidi lafundvwako kuyakhetfwa.
Tintfo letingakhetfwa kwenta iChatforia ibe lula kuyisebentisa ngaphandle kwekwetsembela emsindvweni.
Nika emandla emagama labhalwe bukhoma ngesikhatsi sekushaya lucingo (I-Premium)

Khombisa emagama labhalwe phansi ngesikhatsi sangempela kusuka kumsindvo walomunye umhlanganyeli.
Tecwayiso letibonakalako temilayeto netingcingo\nKhombisa emabhanela kanye nekucwayiza kwesihloko kute ungaphutselwa ngumsebenti.
Dvudvuta imilayeto lemisha (uma isekelwa)\nKuvusa kudvudvuta kwedivayisi ngetatiso.
Khombisa emabhanela kanye nekucwayiza kwesihloko kute ungaphutselwa ngumsebenti.
Angeke ukwati kutifaka wena njengemuntfu lotsintsana naye.
Faka inombolo yelucingo nobe ligama lemsebentisi.
Siphindze futsi sikhonte lokunye lokukhona ngekusebentisa i-Google AdSense. Kukhona kuxhaswa ngalokucondzile—sebentisa lelifomu lelingentasi.

Siphindze futsi sikhonte tintfo letikhona ngekusebentisa i-Google AdSense. Ungacondza iChatforia nge-ID yemshicileli {{pubId}}, noma usebentise lelifomu lelingentasi kute utfole kuxhaswa lokucondzile.

Finyelela basebentisi bemilayeto labatsintsekako ngekubeka lokunambitsekako, lokuphephile. Siniketa luhlu lwemabhanela etindzaweni letibonakala kakhulu, kuxhaswa, kanye nekukhutsata tindlu. Lababhalisile be-Premium ababoni tikhangiso.
Kuvula iklayenti lakho le-imeyili kute utfumele umbuto...
Ucelwa kutsi ugcwalise ligama, i-imeyili, kanye nemlayeto.
Ngiyabonga! Umbuto wakho usendleleni. Sitawulandzela masinyane.
Sicedza luhlu lwetfu lwetikhangiso. Sitjele ngemkhankhaso wakho futsi sitawuncoma kubekwa.
Tivumelwano leticondzile noma luhlelo nge-AdSense/Tikhangiso te-Google
Imvamisa lesetulu yeseshini kanye nesikhatsi sekuhlala ku-UI yekucoca
Lawula kuhumusha, timphendvulo letihlakaniphile, kanye netimphendvulo te-ForiaBot letizenzakalelayo.
Nika emandla imphendvulo letentekelako uma ngimatasatasa
Uma kuvuliwe, tiphakamiso letibuyiselwe yi-AI titawuba nemagama labhalwe ngemjeka lafihlekile
Tfumela imilayeto lembalwa yekugcina letfoliwe (lehlanjululwe) ku-AI kute uphakamise timphendvulo letisheshako.
Mahhala kufaka ekhatsi tihloko letisisekelo. Tfutfukisa kute uvule tihloko letinyenti.
Ngeta umuntfu lowemukelako ngenhla kute ucale...
Kubhala kusuka ekugcineni kuya ekugcineni, kuhumusha etilwimini letingu-100+, imilayeto lenyamalalako, kanye nekushayela ngelivi/ngevidiyo.
Kudeskithophu? Skena ngefoni yakho kute utfole le-app.
Faka ligama lekuchumana leligciniwe nobe inombolo yelucingo.
Sicela uhlole lwati lwakho bese uyazama futsi.
Kubhalisa kwehlulekile. Sicela uphindze uzame futsi.
Sicela wemukele imvume ye-SMS kute uchubeke.
Imizamo leminyenti kakhulu. Ngicela ulindze bese uyazama futsi.
Lelo gama lemsebentisi noma i-imeyili seyivele itsatfwe.
Kubhala kusuka ekugcineni kuya ekugcineni, njalo kuvuliwe
Kubhala kusuka ekugcineni kuya ekugcineni ngekuzenzakalela
Imilayeto lephephile kunoma ngubani, noma ngukuphi
Kushayela lucingo lokusisekelo kanye nekutfumela imilayeto mahhala. I-AI lesetulu kanye netici te-premium tidzinga kutfutfukiswa.
Imilayeto lephephile kunoma ngubani, noma ngukuphi — nge

Tfola inombolo yelucingo lephephile yamahhala yekushayela nekubhalela emhlabeni wonkhe nge-Wi-Fi nobe nge-data. Jabulela kubhala kusuka ekugcineni kuya ekugcineni, imilayeto lenyamalalako, kanye nekushayela ngelivi/ngevidiyo ye-HD — ngemathuluzi lakhelwe ngaphakathi lakusita kutsi uhlale uxhumekile ngaphesheya kwemincele.
Le divayisi inekhiye lokubhala lokuhlukile. Buyisela ukhiye lofanele kute ufinyelele imilayeto yakho.
Le divayisi ayikho ukhiye wakho wekubhala. Yibuyisele kute ifundze imilayeto lebhalwe ngekubhala.
Le divayisi ayikho ukhiye wakho wekubhala. Yibuyisele kute ifundze imilayeto lendzala lebhalwe ngekubhala.
Ucelwa kutsi ufake umuntfu munye lowemukelako kwanyalo.
Kungenani tinhlavu letingu-6. Sebentisa iphasiwedi lecinile naleyehlukile.
Isetjentiselwa kucinisekisa, kuphepha, kanye netici te-SMS lapho kusekelwa khona.

Ngekwakha i-akhawunti, uvuma kutfola tatiso te-SMS letihlobene nemsebenti wakho we-Chatforia (njengemilayeto levela kulabanye basebentisi). Kungasebenta emazinga emilayeto & idatha. Ungakhetsa kuphuma nobe nini ku- Settings.
Kudeskithophu? Skena ngefoni yakho kute utfole le-app.
Skena kute ulandze le- app nobe uyivule ku- browser yakho.
I-akhawunti yakho yadalwa, kepha kusetha tikhiye letiphephile kwehlulekile kuledivayisi. Sicela uphindze uzame futsi.
Kutfumela kwehlulekile. Hlola i-console kute utfole imininingwane.
Seshini yakho iphelelwe sikhatsi. Sicela uphindze ungene ngemvume.
Bhalisa kute ucale kutfumela imilayeto ku Chatforia
Sicela uvume imilayeto ye-SMS nobe ususe inombolo yelucingo.
Ngiyavuma kutfola imilayeto ye-SMS levela eChatforia.
Imilayeto yangasese, lebhalwe phansi, futsi lehunyushwe — ngekushesha.
Nawudala i-akhawunti, uvumelana neMibandzela Yekusebentisa Nenchubomgomo Yetimfihlo.
Lusito: Sebentisa i-akhawunti lefanako kuwebhu nakuselula. Imilayeto yakho ihlala ivumelanisiwe.
Ucelwa kutsi ufake likheli le-imeyili lelisebentako.
I-imeyili yekucinisekisa itfunyelwe. Hlola libhokisi lakho le-inbox.
I-akhawunti yakhiwe. Ucelwa kutsi uhlole i-imeyili yakho kute ucinisekise i-akhawunti yakho ngaphambi kwekutsi ungene ngemvume.
Ucelwa kutsi ucinisekise i-imeyili yakho ngaphambi kwekutsi ungene ngemvume.
Ucinisekile yini kutsi ufuna kukhansela luhlelo lwakho ngekushesha? Loku angeke kuhlehliswe.
Ayikhoni kukhansela luhlelo lwakho nyalo. Sicela uphindze uzame nobe usebentise Lawula kukhokha.
Hamba ngaphandle kwesikhangiso nge-Plus, noma uvule emathulusi e-AI kanye nekwentiwa ngekwemvelo nge-Premium.
Kufinyelela lokusisekelo ku-Chatforia ngetici temilayeto lebalulekile.
Kufinyelela ngaphandle kwesikhangiso ngemlandvo lomudze kanye netici tekudlulisela.
Kufinyelela ngalokugcwele kwekwentiwa ngekwemvelo kwe-premium, emathulusi e-AI, kanye nekwesekelwa lokubalulekile.
Kufinyelela lokusisekelo ku-Chatforia ngetici temilayeto lebalulekile.
Kufinyelela ngaphandle kwesikhangiso ngemlandvo lomudze kanye netici tekudlulisela.
Kufinyelela ngalokugcwele kwekwentiwa ngekwemvelo kwe-premium, emathulusi e-AI, kanye nekwesekelwa lokubalulekile.
Useluhlelo lwamahhala. Tfutfukisa kute uvule letinye tintfo.
Kuhlala uphephile ku-inthanethi akudzingi lwati lolutfutfukile lwebuchwephesha—kumane nje wati, ucaphele, futsi ucaphele kahle. Ngemikhuba lefanele, ungakhuluma ngekwetsembeka futsi ngekuphepha.

Kukhulumisana nge-inthanethi kwente kwaba lula kunakucala kuchumana nebantfu emhlabeni wonkhe. Noma ngabe utfumela imilayeto kubangani, uhlangana nebantfu labasha, noma ubambisana ngekwebungcweti, emapulatifomu ekutfumela imilayeto adlala indzima lenkhulu ekuphileni kwamalanga onkhe. Nanobe kunjalo, kuhlala uphephile ku-inthanethi kubaluleke kakhulu njengekuhlala uxhumekile.

Lomunye wemitsetfo lebaluleke kakhulu yekuphepha ku-inthanethi kugwema kwabelana ngelulwati lolubucayi loluphatselene nawe. Loku kufaka ekhatsi likheli lakho lasekhaya, imininingwane yetimali, emaphasiwedi, nobe nobe nguyiphi imininingwane lengasetjentiswa kabi. Ngisho nasetincociswaneni letingakabaluleki, kuncono kutsi ukhumbule loko lokucocako nekutsi ucoca nabani.

Kukhulumisana ngenhlonipho kusita kwenta simondzawo lesiphephile kuwo wonkhe umuntfu. Gwema kucoca nebantfu labalimatako nobe labahlambalatako, futsi ukhumbule kutsi emavi akho angabatsintsa njani labanye. Kusebentisana lokuhle kufaka sandla ekubeni nesipiliyoni lesincono sabo bonkhe basebentisi.

Emapulatifomu emilayeto yesimanje njenge-Chatforia aniketa emathuluzi ekusita basebentisi kutsi bahlale baphephile. Tintfo letifana nekuvimba, kubika, kanye nekulawula imfihlo takhiwe kute tinikete basebentisi kulawula lokuhlangenwe nako kwabo. Nangabe umuntfu atiphatsa ngendlela lengakafaneli nobe akwente ungakhululeki, kufanele usebentise lamathulusi ngekushesha.

Bakhohlisi bavame kusebentisa emapulatifomu ekutfumela imilayeto kute bakhohlise basebentisi kutsi babelane ngelulwati lwabo nobe batfumele imali. Caphela imilayeto lebonakala iyinhle kakhulu kutsi ingaba liciniso, njengetintfo letingalindzelekile, ticelo letiphutfumako nobe tikhonjiso letingakatayeleki. Ngaso sonkhe sikhatsi cinisekisa kutsi umuntfu lokhuluma naye ungubani ngaphambi kwekutsi utsatse sinyatselo.

Njengobe kuchumana nge-digital kuchubeka kukhula, kugcina kuphepha nekwetsembana kuya ngekuya kubaluleke kakhulu. Ngekulandzela tindlela tekuphepha letisisekelo kanye nekusebentisa emathulusi lakhonakalako, basebentisi bangajabulela tinzuzo tekutfumela imilayeto ngesikhatsi banciphisa bungoti.

Lolunye lwetingucuko letinkhulu kakhulu tekuchumana kuncishiswa kwetihibe tendzawo. Bantfu nyalo bangakhona kuxhumana nalabanye emhlabeni wonkhe ngesikhatsi lesicishe sibe khona. Kungakhatsaliseki kutsi kukhulunywa ngemuntfu sicu, ngebhizinisi, nobe ngekubambisana, emapulatifomu ekutfumela imilayeto enta kutsi libanga libe lincane kakhulu.

Likusasa lekuchumana emhlabeni wonkhe kungenteka lifake ekhatsi emathulusi lasetulu kakhulu, njengemilayeto lesitwa yi-AI, kuhumusha lokwentiwe ncono, kanye nekusebentisa lokutfutfukisiwe. Njengobe tebucwepheshe titfutfuka, kukhulumisana kutawuchubeka kube yintfo lebonakalako futsi lefinyelelekako.

Kukhulumisana sekutfutfuke ngekushesha kuleminyaka lembalwa leyengcile. Loku bekudzingeka kutsi ushaywe lucingo nobe ube nemihlangano yekuhlangana, nyalo sekungentiwa ngekushesha ngekusebentisa emapulatifomu ekutfumela imilayeto. Njengobe tebucwepheshe tichubeka titfutfuka, kukhulumisana kwemhlaba wonkhe kuyashesha, kufinyeleleka futsi kufaka ekhatsi konkhe.
Emapulatifomu lafana ne-Chatforia ayincenye yalokushintja, kusita bantfu kutsi bachumane kalula ngetilwimi kanye nemincele.

Njengobe kuchumana sekuba yidijithali kakhulu, kuba mfihlo kanye nekuphepha kuya ngekubaluleka. Basebentisi bafuna kutetsemba kutsi tingcoco tabo tivikelekile. Timphawu letifana nekubhala ngekubhala kanye netilungiselelo letilawulwa ngumsebentisi tisita ekusekeleni sipiliyoni sekuchumana lesiphephile kakhulu.

Sivinini siyintfo lebalulekile lebumba kuchumana kwalamuhla. Basebentisi balindzele kutsi imilayeto ihanjiswe ngekushesha, futsi sakhiwonchanti sesimanje siyakusekela loko kulindzela. Imilayeto yesikhatsi sangempela yenta kutsi kube netingcoco letimvelo naletimanti.

Lulwimi belusolo lungulesinye setihibe letinkhulu tekuchumana emhlabeni wonkhe. Namuhla, emathulusi ekuhumusha lakhiwe ngaphakathi ayasita kuvala leso sikhala. Emapulatifomu lafana ne-Chatforia avumela basebentisi kutsi bakhulumisane kalula noma ngabe bakhuluma tilwimi letehlukene, kwenta ematfuba lamasha ekuxhumana nekuvisisa.
Hlola lwati ngekuchumana, kuphepha ku-inthanethi, nekutsi bucwepheshe bekutfumela imilayeto buhlanganisa njani bantfu emhlabeni wonkhe.

Bantfu batsembele kuma-app ekutfumela imilayeto kute bakhulumisane onkhe malanga nebangani, umndeni, kanye nalabo labasebenta nabo. Kungakhatsaliseki kutsi kuyintfo lesheshako nobe ingcoco lendze, kutfumela imilayeto kuniketa indlela lekahle nalegucugucukako yekuhlala uxhumene.

Imilayeto iyachubeka nekugucuka ngetintfo letinsha letifana netimphendvulo letiniketwa emandla e-AI, kuhumusha, kanye nekwabelana ngetinsita letinyenti. Njengobe tebucwephesha titfutfuka, emapulatifomu ekutfumela imilayeto atawuba nemandla kakhulu futsi abe netindlela letinyenti.

Emapulatifomu ekutfumela imilayeto ahlanganisa bantfu emhlabeni wonkhe. Ngekufinyelela ku-inthanethi, basebentisi bangakhulumisana kungakhatsaliseki kutsi basendzaweni lenjani, kwenta kube lula kwakha budlelwane kanye nekubambisana emaveni emhlaba.

Emapulatifomu ekutfumela imilayeto abe ngulelinye lemathulusi labaluleke kakhulu ekukhulumisana emhlabeni wanamuhla. Kusukela etingcocweni temuntfu sicu kuya ekusebentisaneni kwemabhizinisi, tinhlelo tekusebenta temilayeto tivumela bantfu kutsi bahlale bachumene ngekushesha futsi ngendlela lefanele.
I-Chatforia yakhiwe ngaletimiso engcondvweni, iniketa imilayeto lesheshako, lephephile, nalesebenta kahle yemhlaba loxhumene.

Emapulatifomu emilayeto yesimanje agcila ekuniketeni basebentisi kulawula imininingwane yabo kanye netingcoco tabo. Timphawu letifana nekubhala ngekubhala, emasethingi ebumfihlo, kanye nekulawula imilayeto kuvumela basebentisi kutsi bakhulume ngekwetsembeka.

Lomunye wetinzuzo letiyinhloko temapulatifomu emilayeto lijubane lawo. Imilayeto ihanjiswa ngaso leso sikhatsi, kuvumela basebentisi kutsi bakhulumisane ngesikhatsi lesifanele. Lelizinga lekuba lula lente kutsi kutfumela imilayeto kube yindlela lekhetsiwe yekukhulumisana kubantfu labanyenti.
Kungani Emapulatifomu Emilayeto Abaluleke Kakhulu Kunakucala
Kushayela ekamelweni kusekela kuphela ividiyo nyalo.
Kushayela nge-video kutfolakala kuphela kubasebentisi be-app nyalo.
Indlela yekufaka sicelo: Sebentisa lenkinobho lengentansi kute utfumele i-imeyili ye-resume yakho kanye netikhonjiso.

Silicembu lelincane lelisungulako lekwakha i-Chatforia — sitfunywa sangasese, semhlaba wonkhe lesetfulwa kuwebhu, iOS, naku-Android. Nangabe unendzaba nebumfihlo, kubhala, kanye netipiliyoni temsebentisi letijabulisako, singatsandza kuva kuwe.

Vula tindzima tekusungulwa: Unjiniyela Loholako Lophelele, Unjiniyela Wemuva (Node.js), Unjiniyela Wekucala/Webhu (React), Unjiniyela Weselula (iOS), Unjiniyela Weselula (i-Android), I-DevOps/SRE, Tekuphepha & Unjiniyela Wekubhala, Unjiniyela Wetekuchumana (Twilio + eSIM).

• Sita ekwakheni sisekelo sesitfunywa lesisha semhlaba wonkhe.
• Kutfumela tintfo letitfutfukisiwe letisetjentiswa kuyo yonkhe iwebhu, iOS, naku-Android.
• Sebenta ngco nemsunguli ngekwakha kanye nekucondzisa umkhicito.
• Tindzawo takho letinemtselela lomkhulu wemfumba: imilayeto, livi, ividiyo, kubhala, telecom, AI.
• Hlanganyela ekucaleni — ngaphambi kwetikali base umsebentisi.

I-Chatforia luhlelo lokusebenta lwemilayeto yekucala yebumfihlo lolwenta kutsi ingcoco yetilwimi letiphambukile ingabi nemzamo. Imilayeto ibhaliwe kusuka ekugcineni kuya ekugcineni ngekuzenzakalela, futsi kuhumusha lokwakhelwe ngaphakathi kusekela tilwimi letingu-100+ ngesikhatsi lesifanele. Basebentisi bangavumela imilayeto lenyamalalako, bagcine emarisidi lafundvwako angakhetsa, futsi bavumelanise kuwo onkhe emadivayisi. Itfolakala ku-iOS, ku-Android, naku-web.
Kute utfole imibuto yetindzaba, sitsintsa ku
Kudeskithophu? Skena ngefoni yakho kute utfole le-app.
Sitawufaka tibuyeketo lapha futsi sibuyekete lusuku lwe “Kugcina kubuyeketwa”.
I-Chatforia ayicondziswe kubantfwana labaseminyakeni lengephansi kwalengu-13 (noma njengobe kudzingwa ngumtsetfo wendzawo yakini).
Niketa futsi uvikele insita (auth, spam/kutfola kuhlukunyetwa).
Lwati lwe-akhawunti (sib., i-imeyili/lucingo) kute wente futsi uvikele i-akhawunti yakho.
Kuhlola/kusebentisa njengemalogi ekushayisana, luhlobo lwedivayisi, noma kuhlatiya lokubi kwenta ncono kusebenta.
Lokucuketfwe lokubhaliwe (imilayeto/tingcingo) kubhaliwe kusuka ekugcineni kuya ekugcineni; angeke sikhone kuyifundza.

LeNchubomgomo Yetimfihlo ichaza kutsi i-Chatforia (“tsi”, “tsi”) ibutsela ndzawonye, isebentisa njani, futsi yabelana njani ngelulwati nawusebentisa tinhlelo tetfu tekusebenta kanye netinsita tetfu. Siklama iChatforia kute sinciphise idatha lesingayifinyelela.
Sigcina kuphela loko lokudzingekako kute sisebentise lensita futsi sisebentise kuphepha lokusezingeni lemboni. Lokucuketfwe kwe-E2E akukwati kukhishwa ngitsi.
Kuya ngesigodzi sakho (sib., GDPR/UK GDPR/CPRA), ungacela kufinyelela, kulungisa, kucisha, noma kukhetsa kuphuma ekucubunguleni lokutsite. Kutsintsana na: lingasese@ingcoco.com.
Asitsengisi imininingwane yemuntfu sicu. Singahlanganyela idatha lelinganiselwe nebacubunguli (sib., tatiso te-push, kuhlatiya) ngaphansi kwetinkontileka leticinile.
Ngeta umuntfu lowemukelako ngenhla kute ucale...

Nangabe ukhetsa kuniketa inombolo yemakhalekhikhini, siyayisebentisa kute sinikete emandla tintfo letinjengekucinisekisa i-akhawunti, tecwayiso tekungena ngemvume, kanye nekutfumela imilayeto nge-SMS lapho kusekelwa khona. Singatfumela imilayeto ye-SMS yekutsengiselana lephatselene ne-akhawunti yakho kanye nemsebenti ku-Chatforia. Ungakhetsa kungayitfoli imilayeto ye-SMS nobe nini ngekutsi uphendvule ngeligama lelibalulekile lekukhetsa kungayitfoli (njengekutsi “STOP”) nobe ngekutsi ushintje tintfo lotikhetsako tesatiso ku-app. Asiyitsengisi inombolo yakho yelucingo nobe siyisebentisele kutsengisa lokungakaphatselani.
Gcina umbhalo lofihlekile kuphela kuseva. Ikhubaza i-AI/Humusha kanye nekubuka ngaphambilini kwekulinganisa.
Kubhala lokucinile kusuka ekugcineni kuya ekugcineni
I-E2EE lecinile ikhubatekile. I-AI/Humusha iphindze inikwe emandla.
I-E2EE lecinile inikwe emandla. I-AI/Kuhumusha kutawukhubateka.

Kubuyiselwa imali kunganiketwa ngetindleko letiphindvwe kabili, emaphutsa ekukhokha, nobe tindzaba tebuchwepheshe letivimbela kufinyelela etintfweni letikhokhelwako. Tonkhe ticelo tiyabuyeketwa ngesimo ngasinye.
Ku Chatforia, silwela kuniketa insita lesezingeni leliphakeme kubo bonkhe basebentisi. LeNchubomgomo Yekubuyisela Imali ichaza kutsi imali ingakhishwa nini.
Ngalokuvamile asikubuyiseli imali yesikhatsi lesingakasetjentiswa, tikhatsi tekubhalisela letiyincenye, nobe kwehluleka kukhansela ngaphambi kwekuvuselela.
Kubhalisa kukhokhiswa kusengaphambili ngendlela lephindzaphindvwako. Ungakhansela nobe nini ngekusebentisa emasethingi e-akhawunti yakho nobe ngeplatifomu lesetjentiselwe kutsenga.
Nangabe uthenge ngekusebentisa emapulatifomu ebantfu besitsatfu njenge-Apple App Store, kubuyiselwa imali kufanele kucelwe ngco ngalawo mapulatifomu.

Inkonzo iniketwa “njengobe injalo” ngaphandle kweticinisekiso. Ngendlela lephelele levunyelwe ngumtsetfo, i-Chatforia ayinasibopho sekulimala lokungacondzi noma lokubangelwa nguloku.
Ngekusebentisa i-Chatforia uvumelana nalemibandzela. Uma ungavumelani, ungayisebentisi lesevisi.

Uma uniketa inombolo yelucingo lwaselula, uyavuma kutsi i-Chatforia ingakutfumelela imilayeto ye-SMS lephatselene ne-akhawunti yakho kanye nekusebentisa lesevisi, njengetecwayiso tekungena ngemvume, tatiso tekuphepha, kanye nemilayeto lephatselene netingcoco loticalako nobe lohlanganyela kuto. Umlayeto lojwayelekile kanye nemazinga emininingwane angasebenta. Ungaphuma emilayezweni ye-SMS nobe nini ngekutsi uphendvule ngeligama lelibalulekile lekuphuma lelisekelwako (sibonelo, “YEKA”) nobe ngekutsi uvuselele emasethingi akho esatiso ku-app.
Ugcina emalungelo kulokucuketfwe kwakho. Usinika emalungelo ladzingekako ekusebentisa lesevisi (sib., kuhamba, kugcina, kuhumusha).
Plus ususa tikhangiso bese wengeta kudluliselwa. I-Premium ivula tingcikitsi letengetiwe, emathoni emlayeto, emathoni ekukhala, emathuluzi e-AI, kanye nesipiliyoni lesiphelele se-Chatforia.

Kubhalisa lokuvuselelwako. Inkhokhelo ikhokhiswa ku-Akhawunti yakho ye-Apple ngesikhatsi ucinisekisa kutsenga. Kubhalisa kuyavuselelwa ngekuzenzakalela ngaphandle nangabe kukhanseliwe lokungenani emahora langu-24 ngaphambi kwekuphela kwesikhatsi lesikhona. Ungaphatsa futsi ukhansele kubhalisa kwakho kumasethingi e-akhawunti yakho ye-Apple.

Emaphakethe emndenini adala noma agcwalise lidatha lekwabelwana ngalo. Ungamema futsi ususe emalunga noma nini.
Kuya ngenchubomgomo yekusebentisa kahle kanye nemikhawulo yendzawo
I-data pool leyabelwana ngayo yemndeni wakho
Emaphakethe emndenini abelana ngedamu linye lemininingwane kuwo onkhe ema-akhawunti e-Chatforia lahlanganisiwe. Kutfolakala kanye nemikhawulo kuya ngelive lakho kanye nemitsetfo yendzawo.
Kufaka ekhatsi 80 GB yedatha lesheshako leyabelwana ngayo — yemindeni lenemandla lehlala ikhona ku-inthanethi.
Kufaka ekhatsi 40 GB yedatha lesheshako leyabelwana ngayo — ilungele emalunga lasebentako langu-3-5.
Kufaka ekhatsi 20 GB idatha ngesivinini lesikhulu lekwabelwana ngayo — enhle kakhulu kubasebentisi labakhanyako laba-2-3.
Yabelana nge-data pool yinye emndenini wakho wonkhe. Umtsetfosivivinyo munye, ema-akhawunti lamanyenti eChatforia, kuhlanganiswa kwemhlaba wonkhe.
Yebo. Ungaphatsa nobe ukhansele kubhalisa kwakho kusuka ekhasini lekukhokha ku-app. Tingucuko ticala kusebenta ekupheleni kwesikhatsi sakho sekukhokha lesikhona nyalo.
Ngingakhansela nobe ngishintje tinhlelo nobe nini?

I-Chatforia Mobile isebentisa kuhlanganiswa kwe-eSIM yemhlaba wonkhe. Kutfolakala kuya ngelive lakho kanye nedivayisi yakho. Utawubona tintfo letisekelwako ngesikhatsi sekusebenta ngaphakatsi kwe-app.

Emaphakethe emndenini adala lidamu lemininingwane leyabelwana ngalo kuwo onkhe ema-akhawunti lamanyenti eChatforia. Umuntfu munye uyakhokha imali, futsi ungamema nobe ususe emalunga bese ubeka imikhawulo kumuntfu ngamunye.

Yebo. Luhlelo lwaMahhala lufaka ekhatsi inombolo ye-Chatforia, kushayela, kanye nemilayeto lenetikhangiso. Ungahlala ku-Free sikhatsi lesidze njengobe utsandza, nobe utfutfukise kute ususe tikhangiso bese uvula letinye tintfo.
Ngabe luhlelo lwaMahhala lumahhala mbamba yini?

Plus kususa tikhangiso futsi kwandzisa umlandvo wemlayeto wakho — ulungele kusetjentiswa kwamalanga onkhe. I-Premium yengeta kwenta ngekwemvelo lokungetiwe, emathulusi e-AI ekubhalela kabusha netimphendvulo, kanye nekwesekelwa lokubalulekile kwebasebentisi labasindzako.
Yini umehluko emkhatsini we Plus ne Premium?
Cala ngeluhlelo lwetfu lwamahhala, lolusekelwa sikhangiso. Hamba ngaphandle kwetikhangiso nge-Plus, noma uvule tici temandla laphelele nge-Premium.
